race.comment: GEEGEES MISSILE (4) is a talented filly who missed the frame for the first time in 11 runs last start in quality grade. Goes well fresh and loves it here. The one to beat if anywhere near best. EASTCOAST MISS (7) resumed over 1200m at this track last time out and finished third, beaten 3.5 lengths. Has three wins when second-up Will be winding up late again. CAPTAIN CAM (2) ran below expectations last time at Devonport Synthetic over 1350m, finishing ninth and beaten 15 lengths. Reunites with Jackson Radley who has four wins from nine rides. Will relish the early pressure and keep coming. FURNEAUX (1) finished 3.5 lengths back in second over 1200m at this track last time out after a gutsy win two runs back. Has a formidable record at this journey with six wins and seven placings from 17 starts and has solid claims. ALPINE THUNDER (3) goes well fresh and worth keeping safe.
